subtext: By using our service, you agree to these terms. Please read them carefully.

terms_and_conditions.title: Service for Users
terms_and_conditions.description: General guidelines for using the Portfolyo community platform.

items.label: Purpose
items.content: A community for users to showcase professional work and find inspiration.

items.label: Availability
items.content: The service is provided 'as is' and requires an active internet connection.

terms_and_conditions.title: User Responsibilities
terms_and_conditions.description: Your commitments as a member of the community.

items.label: Content Ownership
items.content: You retain full ownership of the portfolios and descriptions you share.

items.label: Conduct
items.content: Users agree not to upload illegal, offensive, or impersonating content.

items.label: Security
items.content: You are responsible for the security of your own login credentials.

terms_and_conditions.title: AI Chat Feature
terms_and_conditions.description: Guidelines for using the on-device portfolio advisor.

items.label: Purpose
items.content: The AI chat provides feedback on portfolios, project selection, and presentation — nothing else.

items.label: Limitations
items.content: As a local AI model, it may have knowledge limitations and occasionally provide inaccurate suggestions. Always verify important advice independently.

items.label: Scope
items.content: The chat is restricted to portfolio-related topics. Questions outside this scope will be politely declined.

terms_and_conditions.title: Data and Deletion
terms_and_conditions.description: How your data is managed over time.

items.label: Persistence
items.content: We do not guarantee permanent storage; please maintain your own backups.

items.label: Finality
items.content: Account deletion is permanent and cannot be reversed.

terms_and_conditions.title: Legal Disclaimers
terms_and_conditions.description: Standard legal protections for the service.

items.label: Liability
items.content: The developer is not responsible for loss of data or professional opportunities.

items.label: Updates
items.content: Continued use of the app constitutes acceptance of any updated terms.
